positive: A whimsical, stylized scene featuring a crescent moon cradling a cluster of glowing, bioluminescent woodland mushrooms and ferns. The composition should be centrally focused, emphasizing the delicate glow and deep contrasts. Use a bold, two-tone color palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and pops of luminous teal. The style should be modern linework illustration meets ethereal nature fantasy, ideal for a high-contrast, wearable graphic print. The background should be mostly solid, allowing the glowing elements to pop, suggesting a seamless pattern element or a strong chest graphic. Strong silhouette definition, vibrant glow effect, high detail, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, fuzzy, grayscale, cartoonish, realistic photo, photorealism
